curation_notes: The patch (backport PR #31200 of #31192) refactors sanitizer.go into multiple files and adds policy.AllowStandardURLs() to createRepoDescriptionPolicy(). In the pre-patch code, createRepoDescriptionPolicy() in sanitizer.go creates a bluemonday.NewPolicy() and allows href on anchor elements without scheme restrictions, while the default policy explicitly blocks javascript/vbscript/data schemes. The vulnerability is localized to createRepoDescriptionPolicy in sanitizer.go. The patch is noisy (5 non-test source files changed due to the file-split refactor) but the security-relevant fix is the addition of AllowStandardURLs(). Vulnerability class xss confirmed — matches CWE-79 and the advisory description of Stored XSS.
